hero.badge: Mental care that feels calmer and closer
hero.headlinePart2: that fits how you want to begin care
hero.subtext: Start with guided matching, use a short initial check-in if you want more clarity, or explore verified practitioners directly. Each path is connected to real care steps you can continue right away.
hero.panelTitle: Choose the path that fits your situation
hero.panelNote: Some people want guided matching first. Others prefer to browse practitioners directly. This entry card keeps both paths clear.
hero.quickTitle: Start from the path that feels closest to your need
hero.quickAssessment: Create an account for initial check-ins
hero.quickCardValue: Matching, initial check-ins, discovery, or support

guidedEntry.title: Choose the public entry path that fits you best
guidedEntry.subtitle: You do not need to figure out the whole product structure on your own. Start with the path that best matches how certain or uncertain you feel right now.

matching.title: Start with guided matching
matching.desc: Use guided matching after creating your patient account if you want help narrowing down the right type of practitioner before browsing profiles.

assessment.title: Understand your needs first
assessment.desc: Start with a short initial check-in after creating your patient account if you want more clarity before choosing a practitioner or next care step.

practitioners.title: Browse practitioners directly
practitioners.desc: Go straight to practitioner discovery if you already know you want to compare profiles, experience, and specialties.

support.title: Get help choosing
support.desc: If you are unsure where to begin, patient support is the calmer route once you sign in to your patient account.

howItWorks.title: How the first care step becomes clearer
howItWorks.subtitle: The public entry now points to real paths you can use today, then helps you move into booking and live sessions with less uncertainty.
howItWorks.step1Title: Choose how you want to begin
howItWorks.step1Desc: Start from matching, an initial check-in, specialties, or direct practitioner discovery depending on how much guidance you want.
howItWorks.step2Title: Move into a clearer care path
howItWorks.step2Desc: Review specialties or practitioner profiles with less guesswork and continue through the path that feels right for your situation.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Once you are ready, booking, payment, and session access continue through calmer, clearer product flows.

specialties.eyebrow: Start from the challenge or the kind of support
specialties.title: Choose the care path closest to you
specialties.subtitle: The specialties page helps you move quickly toward the area that best reflects your current need, then continue to the practitioners linked to it.

practitioners.title: Explore real practitioner profiles with clear trust signals
practitioners.subtitle: These cards use the same live practitioner data as public discovery, so you can move from trust to booking steps without leaving the real product path.

articles.title: Published content that supports trust and better choices
articles.subtitle: Articles come from the real public content layer, with clear publication context and direct paths back to practitioner discovery.
articles.unavailableTitle: Public articles are unavailable right now
articles.unavailableNote: You can continue with practitioner discovery for now while article content is temporarily unavailable.
articles.emptyTitle: Published articles are still limited right now
articles.emptyNote: You can still continue through specialties and practitioner discovery while this content expands.

academy.title: What the academy is and who it is for
academy.subtitle: The academy is the platform's public training space. Anyone can browse the courses, register, pay, and follow the next step without needing a care account.

highlights.publicDesc: Courses are published for the public, not only for care journeys.
highlights.simpleDesc: Keep the flow light: read, register, pay, and wait for the next instruction.
highlights.followUpDesc: The team tracks registrations, payments, and WhatsApp follow-up in one place.

academy.examplesTitle: Live academy courses from the catalog
academy.examplesNote: These cards are pulled from the public academy catalog so visitors can see real course examples immediately.
academy.emptyTitle: No academy courses are published yet
academy.emptyNote: As soon as the first public course is published, it will appear here automatically.

whyFayed.eyebrow: Why this experience feels more trustworthy
whyFayed.title: A calmer public entry connected to real care steps
whyFayed.desc: From guided entry to practitioner profiles and published content, this public flow is designed to reduce hesitation and keep your next step clear.
whyFayed.privacyDesc: A flow that respects privacy and keeps information and steps clear at every stage.
whyFayed.certifiedDesc: Practitioners shown on the platform move through a clear review and verification path.
whyFayed.flexibleDesc: Available times are surfaced clearly so choosing the right appointment feels easier.
whyFayed.arabicDesc: Language and flows that feel closer to how Arabic-speaking users search, decide, and move through care.

signals.verifiedProfiles: Verified practitioner profiles with real availability and specialization context.
signals.publishedContent: Published public articles with trust metadata, not decorative snippets.
signals.secureJourney: A clear path from exploration to booking and secure session flow.

footer.tagline: An Arabic mental care platform with clearer choices, calmer flows, and an easier path through specialties and practitioners.
footer.copyright: Fayed Mental Wellness. All rights reserved.
